name: Oriental Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/4 to 1/3 cup tamari or soy sauce
2 to 3 thick slices of ginger root
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the ginger root and onion in a food processor using the metal blade.
2. Add all other ingredients and blend well.
3. Use as dressing for light green salad.
Note: The recipe was cut down from a very large one, so the measurements may not be exact. You can adjust the amounts of ingredients like ginger, vinegar, etc., according to your taste.
